Case #Order #Created AgeStatusQueue CategoryAssign toPending reason Last engagedAgent touches
How this works: every case-comment trail is parsed entry-by-entry (store messages, agent actions, system events, internal-transfer notes). The engine identifies the last meaningful agent action, pending internal transfers, information requests, failed contact attempts and approval/TAT commitments to derive the pending reason; the category and owning team come from the L2/L3 issue mapping plus keyword analysis of the trail. Ageing = case creation time vs your current local time, recomputed live. Uploading a new export with the same columns re-runs the identical engine in your browser — nothing leaves your machine. Rows marked “Needs manual review” or with thin evidence should be eyeballed before assignment; open any row to see the evidence and the full trail.
